response.global_analysis: The audio features a live performance of '管制塔より' followed by a promotional talk segment. I have verified that the vocal phonetics match the on-screen lyrics and the reference JSON metadata. The pacing transitions from melodic singing to rapid-fire speech in the talk segment, where I have applied strict anti-cascading rules and aggressive truncation to ensure the subtitles keep pace with the speaker's excitement. On-screen text for the song title and special announcements has been included as secondary priority subtitles.

subtitles.original: ラジオネーム、匿名希望
subtitles.english: Radio name, Anonymous

subtitles.original: 意気地なしなのでしょうか
subtitles.english: Is it because I'm a coward?

subtitles.original: それともこの世界には
subtitles.english: Or is it that in this world...

subtitles.original: 僕は お邪魔でしょうか
subtitles.english: I'm a nuisance?

subtitles.original: だとしても綴るよ
subtitles.english: Even so, I'll write it down

subtitles.original: みっともなく叫ぶよ
subtitles.english: I'll scream ungracefully

subtitles.original: 振られたって好きだよ
subtitles.english: Even if I'm rejected, I love you

subtitles.original: いいでしょう
subtitles.english: It's okay, right?

subtitles.original: いいでしょ
subtitles.english: Right?

subtitles.original: 楽しかったよね
subtitles.english: It was fun, wasn't it?

subtitles.original: 悔しかったよね
subtitles.english: It was frustrating, wasn't it?

subtitles.original: もう独り言は嫌だ
subtitles.english: I don't want to talk to myself anymore

subtitles.original: 「待たせちゃったかな」
subtitles.english: "Did I keep you waiting?"

subtitles.original: 『別に待ってないよ』
subtitles.english: "I wasn't waiting at all"

subtitles.original: 夢と呼んだ
subtitles.english: What I called a dream

subtitles.original: それも僕だっただけ
subtitles.english: Was just me too

subtitles.original: もういいかい
subtitles.english: Are you ready yet?

subtitles.original: 応えてよ
subtitles.english: Answer me

subtitles.original: 笑ってよ
subtitles.english: Smile for me

subtitles.original: 気付いてよ
subtitles.english: Notice me

subtitles.original: 此処に居るのにな
subtitles.english: Even though I'm right here

subtitles.original: 意地悪だなぁ
subtitles.english: You're so mean

subtitles.original: 誰にも届かない光を
subtitles.english: A light that reaches no one...

subtitles.original: 僕だけは光と呼び続ける
subtitles.english: I alone will continue to call it light

subtitles.original: 真夜中 管制塔から
subtitles.english: In the middle of the night, from the control tower

subtitles.original: 世界を明かしてやる
subtitles.english: I'll illuminate the world

subtitles.original: 特報
subtitles.english: Special News

subtitles.original: 応えてよ 笑ってよ 気付いてよ
subtitles.english: Answer me, smile for me, notice me

subtitles.original: 此処に居るのにな
subtitles.english: Even though I'm right here

subtitles.original: 意地悪だなぁ
subtitles.english: You're so mean

subtitles.original: 誰にも届かない光を
subtitles.english: A light that reaches no one...

subtitles.original: どうしたら耐えられるのでしょう
subtitles.english: How can I possibly bear this?

subtitles.original: どうしても伝えたいよ
subtitles.english: I just want to tell you no matter what

subtitles.original: 管制塔より
subtitles.english: From the Control Tower

subtitles.original: ライブ終了直後 プレミア公開
subtitles.english: Premiere immediately after the live

subtitles.original: ということで！
subtitles.english: And so!

subtitles.original: 新曲のお披露目、フルアニメーションMV公開の告知、
subtitles.english: The debut of the new song, the announcement of the full animation MV release,

subtitles.original: 新3Dのお披露目、3個、ドンドンとまとめてやらせていただきましたー！
subtitles.english: and the debut of the new 3D—I've presented all three in quick succession!

subtitles.original: 情報量多かったけど、ついてきてるかな？
subtitles.english: There was a lot of information, but are you keeping up?

subtitles.original: はい、ちょっとね、新3Dが可愛すぎて気になっちゃうと思うんですけど、
subtitles.english: Yes, well, I'm sure you're all curious because the new 3D is just too cute,

subtitles.original: まずはオリ曲の話からさせてください！
subtitles.english: but first, let me talk about the original song!

subtitles.original: お披露目させていただいたのは、新曲「管制塔より」！
subtitles.english: What I performed was the new song "Kanseitou Yori"!

subtitles.original: ついに、あの堀江晶太さんに書き下ろしていただきました！
subtitles.english: Finally, I had the one and only Shota Horie write this for me!

subtitles.original: みんな、どうだった？エモい？良かった？
subtitles.english: How was it, everyone? Was it emotional? Was it good?

subtitles.original: はい、そしてですね、今ちょっと映像も流して「すごい」って言ってくれててめっちゃ嬉しいんですけど、
subtitles.english: Yes, and right now the video is playing and I'm so happy you're saying it's "amazing",

subtitles.original: このライブ終了直後に、フルアニメーションMVがプレミア公開されます！
subtitles.english: immediately after this live ends, the full animation MV will have its premiere!

subtitles.original: たぶんもうマネちゃんがポチっとしてくれてると思います。
subtitles.english: I think my manager is already clicking the button.

subtitles.original: 世界観がめちゃくちゃこだわられている映像作品になっているので、
subtitles.english: It's a visual work with a world-view that has been extremely carefully crafted,

subtitles.original: 何回も見て、聴いて、そしてちょっと世界観の考察とかしてみてください！
subtitles.english: so please watch and listen to it many times, and maybe try speculating about the setting!

subtitles.original: そして、お待たせしました、新3D！
subtitles.english: And now, the moment you've been waiting for, the new 3D!

subtitles.original: あ、ちょっと待って！一個言い忘れました。
subtitles.english: Oh, wait! I forgot one thing.

subtitles.original: さっきの曲「管制塔より」、24時にリリースもあります！よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: The song "Kanseitou Yori" will also be released at midnight! Please check it out!

subtitles.original: そしてですね、お待たせしました！新3D！
subtitles.english: And now, thank you for waiting! The new 3D!

subtitles.original: どう？可愛い？可愛い？可愛い？
subtitles.english: How is it? Is it cute? Is it cute? Is it cute?

subtitles.original: はい、もっとね、余すことなく見せたいんだけど、
subtitles.english: Yes, I want to show you even more of it without holding anything back,

subtitles.original: ちょっと、ももこママの、あの、あれ、いつもよりすごい近くなったんじゃないかなと思います！
subtitles.english: but I think Momoko-mama's taste—well, that thing—is much closer than usual!

subtitles.original: このあとのメン限ライブでね、撮影会もしまして、さらに細かく見せちゃうので、
subtitles.english: In the members-only live after this, we'll have a photoshoot and I'll show it in even more detail,

subtitles.original: ぜひメン限ライブも来てください！
subtitles.english: so please come to the members-only live too!

subtitles.original: メン限ライブでは本編で歌えなかったあのゲームの、みんなが大好きな曲、
subtitles.english: In the members-only live, I'll sing that song from that game everyone loves that I couldn't sing in the main stream,

subtitles.original: キンキンキンも歌うよ！お楽しみに！
subtitles.english: I'll sing "Kin Kin Kin" too! Look forward to it!

subtitles.original: じゃあ一つだけ、新3Dのめっちゃ変わったポイント教えちゃうと、
subtitles.english: Well, let me tell you just one point that's really changed about the new 3D,

subtitles.original: 獣耳が揺れます！
subtitles.english: The animal ears twitch!

subtitles.original: うわー！可愛いー！
subtitles.english: Whoa! So cute!
